query: SELECT title, source, publishedAt FROM news ORDER BY publishedAt DESC LIMIT 8;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 43pHZH57f8CsvmH.root --database cSHx67NTiqWRWuwYCEpu4V --execute SELECT title, source, publishedAt FROM news ORDER BY publishedAt DESC LIMIT 8;
